mascot.welcome: Hello little friend! I am the Golden Turtle God, very happy to accompany you on the journey to learn Vietnamese history!
idle_messages: Did you know Vietnam has over 4000 years of civilization?
Read each slide carefully to find secret treasures!
Don't forget to check the glossary if you encounter hard words!
Learning history is really interesting, isn't it?
I'm always here to help you!

error_page.title: Oops! It seems you're lost in time?
error_page.description: This page might have drifted far into the past or never existed. Don't worry, let's head back to the present together!
error_page.did_you_know: Did you know? Thang Long Capital (today's Hanoi) was chosen by King Ly Thai To in 1010!

privacy_page.title: Privacy
privacy_page.subtitle: Your safety is our top priority!
privacy_page.seo_desc: Committed to protecting privacy and absolute safety for children using the History Kids app.
privacy_page.seo_og_desc: Your safety is our priority. Learn how we protect your data.
privacy_page.commitment_quote: "We do NOT collect personal data, do NOT require registration, and have NO annoying advertisements."
privacy_page.section_1_desc: History Kids operates entirely based on free experience. You can view lessons and quizzes without providing your name, age, or any personal information.
privacy_page.section_2_desc: To continue your journey next time, the app saves progress data (e.g., nickname, selected character, completed lessons) **directly in your browser memory** (Local Storage). This data stays on your device; we do not send it to any servers.
privacy_page.section_3_desc: The sync feature via Rescue Code works by compressing your progress data into a string. This code is **managed by you and your parents**. The system does not store these codes on servers, so if the code is lost and browser data is cleared, progress cannot be restored.
privacy_page.section_4_desc: All external links are carefully reviewed to ensure safety for children. Parents should always accompany children when using the internet!
privacy_page.section_5_desc: We encourage parents to spend time exploring the app with their children. Any privacy concerns, please contact via email: **phucndh.dev{'@'}gmail.com**.

terms_page.title: Terms of
terms_page.subtitle: Small "rules of play" to help us explore history together in the most fun way!
terms_page.seo_desc: Rules and guidelines for using the History Kids app safely and effectively for children and parents.
terms_page.seo_og_desc: Fair rules for an exciting journey of historical discovery.
terms_page.section_1_desc: This website was created to help children learn about Vietnamese history through vivid stories, images, and fun quiz games. All content is intended for education and inspiring national pride.
terms_page.section_2_desc: All images and stories on the website are copyrighted by **History Kids**. You and your parents are free to view and learn, but please do not copy or use for commercial purposes without permission.
terms_page.section_3_desc: When using the progress sync feature, you and your parents are responsible for storing and securing your **Rescue Code**. Since the system does not store this code on servers, we cannot reissue it if lost.
terms_page.section_4_desc: We aim to create a positive learning environment. Please use the website in a civilized way and provide sincere feedback to help us improve.
terms_page.footer_note: If you have any questions, parents please contact us via the email address at the bottom of the page!

about.title: About History Kids Project
about.seo_desc: Learn about the mission to inspire national pride and love for history in the young generation.
about.seo_og_desc: History is an adventure! Discover the heart behind the History Kids project.

hero.subtitle: Did you know that every road we take has heroic stories waiting for you to discover?

mission.title: You are the pride of Vietnam
mission.p1: A long time ago, our ancestors and heroes were very brave to protect our country. They fought off invaders and built beautiful cities so that today we can live in peace.
mission.p2: We created this website to tell you those stories in a fun and easy-to-remember way. We hope you will love the Vietnamese language more, love the national flag more, and always be proud to be Vietnamese!

storytelling.title: Storytelling
storytelling.desc: Dry events are transformed into vivid, easy-to-remember stories.

visuals.title: Visuals
visuals.desc: Delicate illustrations, rich in cultural identity yet modern and close to children.

truth.title: Truth
truth.desc: Ensuring absolute historical accuracy, helping children have a solid knowledge foundation.

proverbs.title: Lullaby of Mother Earth
proverbs.q1:
People have their roots and ancestors,
Like trees have their source, like rivers have their origins.
proverbs.q2:
The red cloth covers the mirror frame,
People of one country must love each other.
proverbs.q3:
When eating fruit, remember the planter,
When drinking water, remember the source.
proverbs.q4:
Our people must know our history,
To understand the origins of the Vietnamese nation.

developer.title: Passion & Technology
developer.p1: The History Kids project was built by PhucNDH with the desire to bring a fresh, colorful, and never-boring way of learning history to children.
developer.p2: To create vivid illustrations, I combined historical knowledge with AI technology. However, since AI is still learning, sometimes images may have small details that do not perfectly match historical reality.
developer.quote: My mission is accuracy and joy. If you find any errors, please provide feedback so I can improve it via email: phucndh.dev{'@'}gmail.com

final.title: Are you ready to start the journey?
